scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:api && npm run build:worker && npm run build:client && npm run build:web && npm run build:mock-ticketing && npm run build:demo-agent
scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && npm run build:shared && npm run build:api && npm run build:worker && concurrently "PORT=3001 npm run dev -w @ai-governance/api" "PORT=3000 npm run dev -w @ai-governance/web" "node --watch packages/worker/dist/worker.js"
scripts.kill-ports: for p in 3000 3001 3002 3099; do lsof -ti :$p 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; sleep 1; true
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w @ai-governance/api
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w @ai-governance/worker
scripts.lint: npm run lint:packages && npm run lint -w @ai-governance/web
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @ai-governance/shared && npm run clean -w @ai-governance/api && npm run clean -w @ai-governance/worker && npm run clean -w @ai-governance/client && npm run clean -w @ai-governance/web && npm run clean -w @ai-governance/mock-ticketing && npm run clean -w @ai-governance/demo-agent
